description: Update orchestrator.py with new task routing (search, data, schedule, write, life) and model_router.py with new difficulty patterns. Preserve ALL existing code - only ADD new patterns and agent routing. This integrates all Phase 3 components into the main system.
steps: Update J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/orchestrator.py: Add imports for new agents (WebSearchAgent, DataAnalystAgent, SchedulerAgent, WriterAgent, LifeAssistantAgent). Add new pattern lists: SEARCH_PATTERNS, DATA_PATTERNS, SCHEDULE_PATTERNS, WRITE_PATTERNS, LIFE_PATTERNS (with Indonesian and English keywords from the spec). Update classify_task() to return new task types: 'search', 'data', 'schedule', 'write', 'life' in addition to existing 'code', 'research', 'simple'. Add _get methods for each new agent (following existing _get_coder_agent pattern). Update process() to route new task types to their agents. Keep ALL existing code intact.

Update J.A.R.V.I.S_system/core/model_router.py: Add new patterns to MEDIUM_PATTERNS and HARD_PATTERNS that cover data analysis, scheduling, writing, and life assistant tasks. This ensures proper difficulty routing for new agent types. Keep ALL existing patterns intact - only append new ones.
Verify the full import chain works: python -c 'from core.orchestrator import Orchestrator; o = Orchestrator()' should NOT crash (providers may be unavailable but init should succeed gracefully)
acceptance_criteria: orchestrator.classify_task('cari informasi terbaru tentang AI') returns 'search'
orchestrator.classify_task('buatkan email formal ke dosen') returns 'write'
Existing task types still work: 'code', 'research', 'simple' unchanged
python -c 'from core.orchestrator import Orchestrator' succeeds without crash
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PRE-AIAgentJarvis/J.A.R.V.I.S_system && python -c "from core.orchestrator import Orchestrator; print('Orchestrator import OK')"

cd /projects/sandbox/PRE-AIAgentJarvis/J.A.R.V.I.S_system && python -c "from core.orchestrator import Orchestrator; o = Orchestrator.__new__(Orchestrator); from core.model_router import ModelRouter; o.router = ModelRouter(); print('classify search:', o.classify_task('cari berita terbaru')); print('classify data:', o.classify_task('analisis statistik data csv')); print('classify schedule:', o.classify_task('ingatkan deadline besok')); print('classify write:', o.classify_task('tulis email formal')); print('classify life:', o.classify_task('saya bingung pilih keputusan')); print('classify code:', o.classify_task('buat file python hello world')); print('classify research:', o.classify_task('jelaskan detail arsitektur microservice'))"
findings: All acceptance criteria verified. classify_task correctly routes: search, data, schedule, write, life, code, research, simple. New patterns checked before code/research to avoid misclassification. All imports succeed without external dependencies needed. Model router MEDIUM_PATTERNS and HARD_PATTERNS extended with new agent task keywords.
